evidence.text: (00:58:52): And so the psychological safety of everyone's job was safe, coupled with access to all the resources from the company. I was alone back then, and then we were three. The first line of code was written three years before we launched officially, as generally available. Which means that for three years we were dogfooding alpha or beta and able to do that with the full support of the company. So when I mention the long game, I mean it.
